children.heading: Acquisition of lands
children.label: a Acquisition of lands
children.text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for the acquisition of land, interests in land, or structures within the scenic area and on the mainland as provided in .section 546a–4 of this title

children.heading: Other purposes
children.label: b Other purposes
children.text: In addition to the amounts authorized to be appropriated under subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for the development and implementation of the management plan under .section 546a–1(b) of this title
